explanations.14: This line connects your local folder on your computer to a folder inside the Docker container, so files you edit locally are instantly available inside the container.
explanations.22: This tells VS Code to use the PHP CS Fixer extension as the tool that automatically formats your PHP code when you save.
explanations.38: PSR12 is a widely-adopted PHP style standard; this line tells PHP CS Fixer to follow those rules when reformatting your code.
explanations.63: This command runs automatically after Docker finishes setting up the container, installing Rector (a tool for refactoring PHP code) as a development dependency.
